zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Drake於大約1403年出生在英國英格蘭艾可格亞特 沃爾坦時，他的父親William Drake62歲，母親Philippa Dennys39歲。他和Joan Mylwaye至少有5個兒子。他去世於1471年10月17日在英國艾可格亞特 沃爾坦享年69歲，埋葬在英國艾可格亞特 沃爾坦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund Drake于大约1403年出生在英国英格兰艾可格亞特 沃爾坦时，他的父亲William Drake62岁，母亲Philippa Dennys39岁。他和Joan Mylwaye至少有5个儿子。他去世于1471年10月17日在英国艾可格亞特 沃爾坦享年69岁，埋葬在英国艾可格亞特 沃爾坦。

nameMeanings.name: Drake
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English drake, either ‘drake, male duck’ (compare Duck ) or ‘dragon’ (Old English draca ‘snake, dragon’ or the cognate Old Norse draki), including an emblematic dragon on a flag (compare Dragon ). Both the Old English and the Old Norse forms are from Latin draco ‘snake, monster’; its sense as a nickname is unclear but it may have had the sense ‘standard bearer’. The name was taken to Ireland in the 13th century and reinforced by later English settlers in the 17th century.
German: from Low German drake ‘dragon’, familiar as image on signboards, hence a topographic or habitational name referring to a house or inn with such signboard.
Dutch: variant, mostly Americanized and Flemish, of Draak, a cognate of 2 above, from draak (Middle Dutch drake) ‘dragon’.

variants.name: Duck
meanings: Irish: adoption of the English name (see 1 above) as an equivalent of Lohan (an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Leocháin ‘descendant of Leochán’) by mistranslation, as if from lacha ‘duck’.
North German (also Dück) and German (Dück): see Dueck .

variants.name: Drakes
meanings: English: variant of Drake , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

English: habitational name from Drax (Yorkshire). The placename probably derives from Old English dræg ‘portage, place where boats are dragged’ or dræg ‘drag net’, influenced by Old Norse drag ‘portage’, with a plural drages being shortened to drags, Drax.
In some cases perhaps an Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) cognate in some other language.

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Drake was born about 1403, in Great Waltham, Essex, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Drake, was 62 and his mother, Philippa Dennys, was 39. He had at least 5 sons with Joan Mylwaye. He died on 17 October 1471, in Great Waltham, Essex, England, at the age of 69, and was buried in Great Waltham, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Drake est né environ 1403, à Great Waltham, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Drake, avait 62 ans et sa mère, Philippa Dennys, avait 39 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils avec Joan Mylwaye. Il est décédé le 17 octobre 1471, à Great Waltham, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Great Waltham, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund Drake um 1403 in Great Waltham, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Drake 62 und seine Mutter Philippa Dennys 39. Er hatte mit Joan Mylwaye mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb am 17. Oktober 1471 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Great Waltham, Essex, England und wurde in Great Waltham, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Drake è nato il circa 1403 nel Great Waltham, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Drake, aveva 62 anni e il suo madre, Philippa Dennys, aveva 39 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli con Joan Mylwaye. Morì il 17 ottobre 1471, nel Great Waltham, Essex, England, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Great Waltham, Essex, England.

ja.Great Waltham, Essex, England: イギリスエセックスグレアト ワルサム
ja.Church of Saint Mary and Saint Lawrence,: イギリスエセックスグレアト ワルサム
ja.St Lawrence, Essex, England: イギリスエセックススト ラウレンス
ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Drakeが約1403年にイギリスイギリスエセックスグレアト ワルサムで生まれた時，父William Drakeは62歳，母Philippa Dennysは39歳であった。彼はJoan Mylwayeとの間に少なくとも5人の息子をもうけた。彼は1471年10月17日にイギリスエセックスグレアト ワルサムで69歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスグレアト ワルサムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Drake(이)가 대략 1403년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 그리트 월섬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Drake(은)는 62세였고, 그의 어머니 Philippa Dennys(은)는 39세였다. 그는 Joan Mylwaye(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1471년 10월 17일 영국 에세스 그리트 월섬에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 그리트 월섬에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Drake nasceu aproximadamente 1403, em Great Waltham, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Drake, tinha 62 anos e sua mãe, Philippa Dennys, tinha 39 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos com Joan Mylwaye. Ele faleceu em 17 de outubro de 1471, em Great Waltham, Essex, Inglaterra, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Great Waltham, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Drake родился около 1403 г. в местности грит валтам, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Drake было 62 года, а матери, которую звали Philippa Dennys, 39. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей от Joan Mylwaye. Он умер 17 октября 1471 г. в местности грит валтам, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности грит валтам, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edmund Drake nació aproximadamente 1403, en Great Waltham, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Drake, tenía 62 años y su mamá, Philippa Dennys, tenía 39 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos con Joan Mylwaye. Murió el 17 de octubre de 1471, en Great Waltham, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Great Waltham, Essex, Inglaterra.
